entities.description: A statistical procedure that integrates micro-level studies to derive macro-level policy inferences

entities.description: A benefit metric assessed in the performance of watershed programs

entities.description: A benefit metric assessed in the performance of watershed programs

entities.name: EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITIES

entities.description: The frequency of cropping per unit area per year, augmented by watershed programs

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER RESOURCES
entities.description: Natural resources conserved through watershed program interventions

entities.description: The involvement of local communities in the implementation of watershed programs

entities.name: RAINFALL

entities.description: The organizational and policy framework required to maximize program benefits
